info.name: WhatsApp AI Assessment API
info.description: API collection for the WhatsApp AI Assessment Platform

request.description: Check if the server is running
Open in a browser to scan the WhatsApp QR code. Returns an HTML page that auto-refreshes. Shows a QR image when ready, a spinner while waiting, and a success message when connected.

response.name: QR ready (HTML)
response.body: <!-- HTML page with QR code image. Open in browser, not Postman. -->

response.name: Already connected (HTML)
response.body: <!-- HTML page showing WhatsApp Connected confirmation -->

request.description: Send a WhatsApp message to a phone number. The platform sends the message and returns the AI-generated reply.

response.name: 200 Success
400 Validation Error

request.description: Get all messages for a specific conversation. Set the conversationId variable first.

response.name: 200 Success
400 Invalid UUID
